articles.title_zh: 中国 AI 治理框架成型：40+ 项国标 + 智能体互联 7 项国标，从底层算力到智能体协同的全栈规范化
articles.title_en: China's AI Governance Framework Takes Shape: 40+ National Standards plus 7 Agent Interconnection Standards
articles.subtitle_zh: 2026-06-26 国家标准委一次性披露 40+ 项 AI 国标与智能体互联 7 项国标，标志中国 AI 产业从「野蛮生长」迈入「规范化深耕」的分水岭
articles.subtitle_en: Marking the watershed from 'unbridled growth' to 'regulated deep cultivation'
articles.summary_zh: 40+ 项 AI 国标 + 智能体互联 7 项国标同步落地，标志中国 AI 治理框架成型。本文从国标全栈意义、智能体互联深层逻辑、产业链三梯队受益、全球治理范式四个维度拆解。
articles.summary_en: 40+ AI national standards plus 7 Agent Interconnection standards land simultaneously, marking the formation of China's AI governance framework.

articles.title: 开源大模型的中国新平衡：GLM-5.2登顶与DeepSeek 510亿的产业共振
articles.title_en: China's New Equilibrium in Open-Source LLMs: GLM-5.2 Tops Charts as DeepSeek Closes $51B Round
articles.summary: GLM-5.2登顶IndexShare、DeepSeek完成510亿美元A轮融资、字节豆包专业版三档定价、招商银行日均330亿Token——四个看似独立的事件，正在中国AI产业激起同一场共振：开源能力、商业化定价、行业落地、资本估值，正在以前所未有的速度互相校准。
articles.summary_en: GLM-5.2 tops the IndexShare leaderboard, DeepSeek closes a $51B Series A, ByteDance Doubao Pro launches three-tier pricing, and China Merchants Bank hits 33B daily tokens — four seemingly separate events resonate to reshape China's open-source LLM equilibrium across capability, pricing, deployment, and valuation.

articles.title: OpenAI自研芯片Jalapeño发布：天下苦英伟达久矣，推理芯片战争开打
articles.title_en: OpenAI Jalapeño Chip Launch: The War on NVIDIA Dominance Begins
articles.summary: OpenAI正式发布首颗自研AI芯片Jalapeño，与博通合作9个月完成，专为推理设计。天下苦英伟达久矣，谷歌TPU、亚马逊Trainium、微软Maia、自研芯片浪潮全面袭来。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI officially launches first self-developed AI chip Jalapeño with Broadcom in 9 months, inference-only design. Everyone suffers from NVIDIA dominance, Google TPU Amazon Trainium Microsoft Maia self-developed chip wave arrives.

articles.title: Agentic AI元年：从对话框到行动端，AI产业范式转移深度解析
articles.title_en: The Agentic AI Era: A Comprehensive Look at the Industrial Paradigm Shift
articles.summary: 2026年AI产业范式转移：从Chatbot到Agentic AI，Anthropic 9650亿美元估值超越OpenAI，资本全面转向智能体赛道
articles.summary_en: 2026 AI industry paradigm shift: from Chatbot to Agentic AI, Anthropic's $965B valuation surpasses OpenAI, capital pivots to agent track

articles.title: 从「百模大战」到价值兑现：中国AI大模型规模化应用领跑全球
articles.title_en: From Model Wars to Value Delivery: China's AI LLM Scale Application Leads the World
articles.summary: OpenRouter数据显示，中国AI大模型词元调用量连续八周稳居全球首位，日均Tokens突破180万亿。从百模大战到价值兑现，中国AI正在经历规模化应用的质变。
articles.summary_en: OpenRouter data shows China's AI LLM token usage ranks first globally for 8 consecutive weeks, with daily tokens exceeding 180 trillion. China is transitioning from model wars to value delivery.

articles.title: AI算力变局：从GPU独大到CPU回归
articles.title_en: AI Compute Revolution: From GPU Dominance to CPU Return
articles.summary: 智能体时代正在重塑AI算力市场格局。传统训练阶段1:8的CPU/GPU配比正迅速趋向1:1，英特尔至强服务器CPU供不应求，AMD将服务器CPU市场规模预测翻倍。这场算力配置的质变，不仅是芯片巨头的机遇，更是整个AI产业从生成式向自主智能体演进的技术标志。
articles.summary_en: The Agent era is reshaping the AI compute landscape. The traditional 1:8 CPU/GPU ratio from training is rapidly converging to 1:1, with Intel Xeon server CPUs in short supply and AMD doubling its server CPU market forecast. This qualitative shift in compute configuration marks not just an opportunity for chip giants, but a technological milestone for the entire AI industry as it evolves from generative to autonomous agents.

articles.title: AI人才版图重构：谷歌为何成为全球AI「黄埔军校」？
articles.title_en: The Great AI Brain Drain: Why Google Became the World's Top AI 'Whipping Boy'
articles.summary: 2026年6月第三周，全球AI行业见证人才地震：Transformer之父Noam Shazeer加入OpenAI，诺奖得主John Jumper加入Anthropic。本文深度解析顶尖人才为何离开Google，探讨AI行业从技术竞赛向商业化竞赛的范式转移。
articles.summary_en: In the third week of June 2026, the global AI industry witnessed an unprecedented talent earthquake. This article analyzes why top talents are leaving Google, exploring the paradigm shift from technology race to commercialization race.

articles.title: 具身智能落地元年：从VLA技术突破到消费政策的产业共振
articles.title_en: Embodied Intelligence Year One: VLA Breakthroughs and Consumer Policy Convergence
articles.summary: 北京大学MotionVLA技术突破、商务部「AI+消费」政策落地、人形机器人纳入消费新赛道——技术、政策与市场三重信号汇聚，具身智能正从实验室走向千家万户。
articles.summary_en: Peking University MotionVLA breakthrough, Ministry of Commerce AI+consumption policy, humanoid robots entering consumer market — technology, policy, and market signals converge as embodied intelligence moves from lab to home.

articles.title: AI产业「双轨并进」：政策红利与IPO狂潮下的万亿新战场
articles.title_en: AI Industry's Dual-Track Surge: Policy Dividends & IPO Frenzy
articles.summary: 2026年6月，中国八部门联合发文推进AI+消费发展，商务部等17项举措直指消费场景；与此同时，Anthropic与OpenAI的IPO竞速进入白热化阶段。
articles.summary_en: June 2026 sees China 8 ministries issuing 17 measures for AI+consumption while Anthropic and OpenAI race toward IPO.

articles.title: AI助手「自选模型」时代：苹果WWDC开启消费AI新纪元
articles.title_en: Apple WWDC 2026: Siri Gemini Switch Marks New Era of Choose Your Own AI Model
articles.summary: 苹果WWDC 2026重磅宣布Siri底层全面切换Gemini，用户可在Gemini/ChatGPT/Claude三选一。苹果成为首个允许用户「自选模型」的消费级平台。这一改变意味着什么？深度解析苹果AI战略转型与消费AI的新格局。
articles.summary_en: Apple WWDC 2026 announces Siri complete switch to Google Gemini as default engine, with users able to choose between Gemini, ChatGPT, and Claude. Apple becomes first consumer platform to offer choose your own AI model.

articles.title: SpaceX 600亿美元收购Cursor：当航天巨头转型AI编程公司
articles.title_en: SpaceX Acquires Cursor for $60B: When a Space Giant Transforms into an AI Coding Company
articles.summary: SpaceX以约600亿美元收购AI编程工具公司Cursor，这是AI行业迄今最大的收购案之一。当一家航天公司押注AI编程，背后是马斯克对AI辅助工程的全栈野心——从火箭到代码，一切皆可自动化。
articles.summary_en: SpaceX acquired AI coding tool company Cursor for approximately $60 billion, one of the largest AI acquisitions ever. When a space company bets on AI coding, it reflects Musk's full-stack ambition for AI-assisted engineering — from rockets to code, everything can be automated.

articles.title: 资本狂潮：2026年AI融资超万亿美元的冷思考
articles.title_en: Capital Frenzy: Cold Analysis of $1 Trillion+ AI Funding in 2026
articles.summary: 2026年上半年AI行业融资规模已突破万亿美元。Mistral估值200亿欧元、NEURA Robotics融资14亿美元、Prometheus估值410亿美元——资本疯狂涌入背后的逻辑是什么？这场狂潮是泡沫还是革命的前夜？深度分析三大底层逻辑与四大泡沫信号。
articles.summary_en: 2026 H1 AI financing exceeded $1 trillion. Mistral valued at €20B, NEURA Robotics raised $1.4B, Prometheus valued at $41B — what drives the capital frenzy? Deep analysis of three underlying logics and four bubble signals.

articles.title: AI价格战：DeepSeek如何用1/10的成本颠覆AI巨头
articles.title_en: AI Price War: How DeepSeek Disrupts AI Giants with 1/10 the Cost
articles.summary: 开源AI模型正在以摧枯拉朽之势改写企业市场的游戏规则。Vercel最新数据显示，DeepSeek在token处理量占比从4月的不足1%飙升至5月的17%，单月涨幅高达16倍。企业用户发现DeepSeek的API成本仅为Anthropic的十分之一——这不仅是一次技术迭代，更是一场关乎生存的成本革命。
articles.summary_en: Open-source AI models are rewriting enterprise market rules. Vercel data shows DeepSeek's token processing share surging from under 1% in April to 17% in May. Enterprise users discovered DeepSeek's API cost is just 1/10 of Anthropic's—a technology iteration and a survival-level cost revolution.

articles.title: AI模型成为「受控技术」：Anthropic被强制关停的历史性事件
articles.title_en: AI Models as Controlled Technology: The Historic Anthropic Shutdown
articles.summary: 美国政府首次使用出口管制权力强制关停Anthropic的Fable 5和Mythos 5模型，开创将AI模型视为「受控技术」的先例。72小时内从发布到关停的极速陨落，亚马逊的安全演示成为导火索，盟友愤怒反应，AI公司面临产品随时被关停的新现实。
articles.summary_en: The US government for the first time used export control powers to force Anthropic to shut down Fable 5 and Mythos 5, creating a precedent for treating AI models as 'controlled technology.' From launch to shutdown in 72 hours, Amazon's safety demo as the trigger, allies' anger, and the new reality that AI products can be shut down at any time.

articles.title: AI商业革命：从聊天到购物——当AI智能体走进消费市场
articles.title_en: AI Commerce Revolution: From Chat to Shopping — When AI Agents Enter the Consumer Market
articles.summary: OpenAI与Visa达成AI支付合作，ChatGPT智能体可代客购物。德国法院裁定Google对AI Overviews虚假陈述承担法律责任。Coinbase让AI智能体进入交易市场。AI从工具进化为商业参与者，消费市场的游戏规则正在被重写。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI and Visa partner on AI payments, enabling ChatGPT agents to shop for users. A German court rules Google liable for false AI Overview statements. Coinbase brings AI agents into trading. AI evolves from tool to commercial participant, rewriting the rules of the consumer market.

articles.title: AI算力军备竞赛：一周1200亿美元基础设施投入意味着什么？
articles.title_en: AI Infrastructure Arms Race: What Does $120 Billion in One Week Mean?
articles.summary: 2026年6月第二周，AI行业出现前所未有的基础设施投入浪潮：Apollo/Blackstone为Anthropic设计350亿美元融资方案、Alphabet筹集850亿创纪录资金、Google月均9.2亿美元租用xAI算力。一周内1200亿美元级别的投入，正在重塑全球AI竞争格局。
articles.summary_en: In the second week of June 2026, the AI industry saw an unprecedented infrastructure investment wave: Apollo/Blackstone designed a $35B financing package for Anthropic, Alphabet raised a record $85B, and Google pays $920M/month to lease xAI compute. $120B in one week is reshaping the global AI competition landscape.

articles.title: Anthropic发布Fable 5与Mythos 5：从「太危险不能公开」到面向所有人
articles.title_en: Anthropic Releases Fable 5 and Mythos 5: From 'Too Dangerous to Release' to Available to All
articles.summary: Anthropic正式发布Claude Fable 5和Mythos 5，首次披露「分层安全」策略：Fable面向公众但敏感请求自动降级至Opus 4.8，Mythos保留完整能力仅向约200家受信机构开放。Stripe实测5000万行代码迁移1天完成。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic officially releases Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, debuting a 'tiered safety' strategy: Fable is publicly available with auto-downgrade to Opus 4.8 for sensitive queries, while Mythos retains full capabilities for ~200 trusted institutions. Stripe tested: 50M-line codebase migration in 1 day.

articles.title: WWDC 2026深度解读：苹果Siri重生，AI超级应用大战开局
articles.title_en: WWDC 2026 Deep Dive: Apple Siri Reborn, AI Super App War Begins
articles.summary: 苹果WWDC 2026发布史上最大Siri重构，基于Gemini的AI助手以独立App亮相。OpenAI同步宣告Chat已死。深度解读消费AI从聊天机器人到智能体超级应用的范式转移。
articles.summary_en: Apple's WWDC 2026 brings the biggest Siri overhaul ever, with Gemini-powered AI assistant launching as a standalone app. OpenAI simultaneously declares 'Chat is Dead.' A deep dive into the paradigm shift from chatbots to agentic super apps in consumer AI.

articles.title: AI万亿IPO潮：历史性上市浪潮还是泡沫信号？
articles.title_en: Trillion-Dollar AI IPO Wave: Historic Listing Surge or Bubble Signal?
articles.summary: SpaceX、Anthropic、OpenAI三家合计融资目标2000亿美元，Michael Burry和多位分析师发出泡沫警告。深度解析AI行业历史性IPO浪潮的估值逻辑、市场风险与历史镜鉴。
articles.summary_en: SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI target $200B combined. Michael Burry and analysts issue bubble warnings. Deep analysis of valuation logic, market risks, and historical parallels behind the historic AI IPO wave.
articles.author: AI News Daily

articles.title: 当国家成为AI股东：美国政府入股科技公司的战略逻辑与风险
articles.title_en: When the State Becomes an AI Shareholder: Strategic Logic and Risks of US Government Equity Stakes
articles.summary: 美国政府考虑入股OpenAI等AI企业，从监管者跃迁为股东。深度分析这一史无前例的政策构想背后的战略逻辑、国际先例、利益冲突与制度风险。
articles.summary_en: The US government considers taking equity stakes in OpenAI and other AI firms, leaping from regulator to shareholder. Deep analysis of the strategic logic, international precedents, conflicts of interest, and institutional risks behind this unprecedented policy proposal.
articles.author: AI News Daily

articles.title: 特斯拉Robotaxi：全城无人驾驶的豪言与20辆车的现实
articles.title_en: Tesla Robotaxi: City-Wide Driverless Promise vs 20-Car Reality
articles.summary: 特斯拉宣布Robotaxi覆盖奥斯汀全城，但实际运营车辆仅20辆。深度分析纯视觉路线的商业化困境、与Waymo的规模差距、FSD v15的赌注，以及中美Robotaxi赛道格局。
articles.summary_en: Tesla announces city-wide Robotaxi coverage in Austin, but only 20 cars are actually operating. Deep analysis of vision-only commercialization challenges, the Waymo gap, the FSD v15 bet, and the US-China Robotaxi landscape.
articles.author: AI News Daily

articles.title: AI递归式自我改进：Anthropic为何呼吁暂停？
articles.title_en: Recursive Self-Improvement: Why Anthropic Calls for a Pause
articles.summary: Anthropic发布重磅报告《When AI Builds Itself》，揭示AI递归式自我改进的最新进展。Claude在AI研发任务中已超越人类水平，前沿实验室需制定可验证的协调暂停机制。深度解读报告核心发现与行业影响。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic releases landmark report 'When AI Builds Itself', revealing latest advances in recursive self-improvement. Claude surpasses human-level performance in AI R&D tasks. Frontier labs must develop verifiable coordinated pause mechanisms.
articles.author: AI News Daily

articles.title: 英伟达Cosmos 3深度解读：物理AI的iPhone时刻
articles.title_en: NVIDIA Cosmos 3 Deep Dive: The iPhone Moment for Physical AI
articles.summary: 英伟达发布全球首款全开源全模态物理AI世界模型Cosmos 3，将AI从虚拟世界推向真实物理世界。深度解析其技术架构、行业影响与未来走向。
articles.summary_en: NVIDIA launches the world's first fully open-source multimodal physical AI world model Cosmos 3, pushing AI from virtual to real physical worlds. Deep analysis of its architecture, industry impact, and future direction.
articles.author: AI News Daily

articles.title: DeepSeek首轮融资500亿：中国AI基础设施自主化的分水岭时刻
articles.title_en: DeepSeek 50B RMB First Round: A Watershed Moment for China AI Sovereignty
articles.summary: DeepSeek启动首轮融资500亿元，腾讯宁德时代参投，估值达4000亿元。深度解析这笔融资背后的产业逻辑、能源-AI融合趋势及对中国AI自主化的战略意义。
articles.summary_en: DeepSeek launches first funding round of 50 billion RMB, with Tencent and CATL participating, reaching 400 billion RMB valuation. Deep analysis of the industrial logic, energy-AI convergence, and strategic significance for China AI sovereignty.
articles.author: AI News Daily

articles.title: 2026年AI大模型竞赛新格局——Anthropic估值登顶，具身智能元年开启
articles.title_en: New Landscape of AI LLM Competition in 2026: Anthropic Valuation Peaks, Embodied AI Era Begins
articles.summary: Anthropic完成650亿美元融资估值达9650亿美元首次超越OpenAI，MiniMax M3编程能力超越GPT-5.5，OpenAI正式进军机器人赛道。深度解读2026年AI大模型竞争新格局。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic completes $65B funding at $96.5B valuation surpassing OpenAI, MiniMax M3 coding beats GPT-5.5, OpenAI enters robotics. Deep analysis of the new AI LLM competitive landscape in 2026.
articles.author: AI News Daily

articles.title: 英伟达GTC 2026：AI芯片三箭齐发，智能体时代全面到来
articles.title_en: NVIDIA GTC 2026: Three AI Chips Launched, Agent Era Fully Arrives
articles.summary: 黄仁勋在COMPUTEX大会上发布三枚核弹：Vera Rubin正式量产、RTX Spark杀入PC市场、Vera CPU正面挑战英特尔。深度解读英伟达从GPU巨头向全栈AI基础设施运营商的转型战略。
articles.summary_en: Jensen Huang unveils three blockbuster products at COMPUTEX: Vera Rubin enters mass production, RTX Spark enters PC market, Vera CPU challenges Intel. Deep analysis of NVIDIA's transformation from GPU giant to full-stack AI infrastructure operator.
articles.author: AI News Daily
